The Bumpboxx BB-777 is the ultimate in boombox nostalgia - The Verge
articles.description: The Bumpboxx BB-777 is a modern recreation of the iconic Sharp GF-777 with dual cassette decks, a CD player, AM / FM radio, and Bluetooth support.

articles.title: Apple Music 5.2 for Android adds iOS 26.4 Playlist Playground, album redesign - 9to5Google
articles.description: Following the first iOS 26.4 preview, Apple Music 5.2 entered beta earlier this week with three new features.

articles.title: Marvel Rivals Devs Won't Introduce Original Characters Anytime Soon, Because There Are Simply Too Many Marvel Characters Already - IGN
articles.description: NetEase Games isn't worried about balance in Marvel Rivals as its roster expands with more playable heroes, but don't expect to see any original characters anytime soon.
